chunks.title: Exhortation on Almsgiving and Prayer
chunks.reason: Teaches about performing acts of charity and prayer without seeking recognition, emphasizing sincerity and private devotion.

chunks.title: Exhortation on Storing Treasure in Heaven
chunks.reason: Discusses the importance of spiritual over material wealth, using metaphors about the eye and light to illustrate inner values.

chunks.title: Exhortation on Not Worrying About Daily Needs
chunks.reason: Encourages trust in God's provision, contrasting human anxiety with divine care, and concludes with a directive to seek God's kingdom first.
